title: Stennos Green Savanna
description: 🔎 One Simple Change • The Savanna is a lighter green, period. Not 'Plains-Green', still a Savanna-shade, but no longer yellow

## Stennos Green Savanna
Only modifies the biome color map for the Savanna biome tint


---


## Features
- **Grass & Leaves** are slightly more green in color, but not super green like a Plains biome; you can still tell it's a Savanna, but it's no longer a very yellow shade <sup>[[1]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/greensavanna/gallery)</sup>
- Changes the dull olive green Savanna to a slightly nicer green shade, to make it a more welcoming environment to build in
- Almost like Pains and never rains! Great certain types of building.
- <sup>Initially designed for use in [Streams](https://www.twitch.tv/stennos) & [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Stennos) videos by [Stennos](https://linktr.ee/Stennos)</sup>


<details>
<summary>Install</summary>

- **Option 1:** Click "Download" button > Install with Modrinth App
- **Option 2:** Download > Launch Minecraft: Java Edition > Resource Packs Menu > Open Resource Packs Folder > Copy Resource Pack Downloaded Zip file here > Resource Packs Game Menu > Click Arrow to move “**Stennos Green Savanna**” to the right side

</details>


<details>
<summary>FAQ (optifine?)</summary>

- **Is Optifine Needed?** No, this pack works on it’s own.
- **Mod Support?** I do not play modded, and do not currently plan to add support for mods
- **Do You Have Other Packs?** Yes I do! You can find all of my public packs in my [Modrinth Projects Page](https://modrinth.com/user/Stennos) and find them quickly at [linktr.ee/StennosPacks](https://linktr.ee/StennosPacks)
- **Can I Use Your Textures?** You can use these edited files, and edit them as well, just provide credit to “[Stennos.com](https://stennos.com/)” in the readme file and do not put the pack behind a Pay Wall.
<sup>**License:** [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)</sup>
- **Can I Leave Feedback?** Yes, you can chat with me directly when I’m [live on Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/stennos) or in my [Discord](https://tr.ee/StennosDiscord) 
- **Do you like chicken wings?** I could eat chicken wings every day and never get tired of them; that's why I make these packs, so I can get chicken wing money. Feel free to support my happiness if you're rich [![ko-fi](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgistcdn.githack.com%2FRoundaround%2F98ecf33ee2e067ca7d7cea091de04307%2Fraw%2Fef54ea02d444dc0ebff3018a34777ece8f71347a%2Fko-fi_button.svg&n=-1)](https://ko-fi.com/stennos)

</details>
